ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Financial Services) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market value of the company's outstanding shares */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* The highest price of the stock over the past 52 weeks */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* The lowest price of the stock over the past 52 weeks */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* The annual dividend per share divided by the stock price */,
  "dividend_per_share" REAL /* The total dividends paid out per share */,
  "earnings_per_share" REAL /* The portion of a company's profit allocated to each outstanding share of common stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* A measure of the stock's volatility in relation to the overall market */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the stock data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ID */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "unadjusted_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded without adjustments */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume-Weighted Average Price (VWAP) */,
  "change_over_time" REAL /* Change in price over time */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the date (e.g., May 17, 23) */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* The price of the stock before the market opens */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* The price of the stock after the market closes */,
  "pre_market_volume" INTEGER /* The volume of shares traded before the market opens */,
  "after_hours_volume" INTEGER /* The volume of shares traded after the market closes */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* The change in volume from the previous day */,
  "volume_change_percent" REAL /* The percentage change in volume from the previous day */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* The market capitalization of the company on the given date */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* The price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "earnings_date" TEXT /* The date of the next earnings report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the daily price data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, compliance officer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "address" TEXT /* The physical address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* The type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* The geographical location of the user when accessing the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition for triggering the alert (e.g., >, <, =) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is active */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* How often the alert should be checked (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* The specific time of day when the alert should be checked */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* The type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_address" TEXT /* The email or phone number where the notification should be sent */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* The date and time when the alert was last triggered */,
  "trigger_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the alert has been triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, correlation study) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report (e.g., text, charts, tables) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* The status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* The format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* A list of user IDs with whom the report is shared */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* The access level required to view the report (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
